isi.driveFileNames: Witty - Drive Me To The Stars.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Witty - Drive Me To The Stars

Romanization

Drive me to the stars
Lead me through the night
uri dulman nameun bam
Drive me to the stars

Fly me through your heart
neoui pum aneseo
beonjyeoga
Softly

ithyeojineun i dosi
heuteojin gieok sai
ne moksoril ttaragalge
Take me where you’re fading
heuryeojineun changbakken
bitdeuri chumeul chwo
jamdeulgi sireun bamiya

Tonight is ours to take
And the stars begin to wake

Drive me to the stars
Lead me through the night
uri dulman nameun bam
Drive me to the stars

Fly me through your hearts
neoui pum aneseo
beonjyeoga
Softly

Tonight is ours to take
And the stars begin to wake

Drive me to the stars
Lead me through the night
uri dulman nameun bam
Drive me to the stars

Fly me through your hearts
neoui pum aneseo
beonjyeoga
Softly

Hangeul

Drive me to the stars
Lead me through the night
우리 둘만 남은 밤
Drive me to the stars

Fly me through your heart
너의 품 안에서
번져가
Softly

잊혀지는 이 도시
흩어진 기억 사이
네 목소릴 따라갈게
Take me where you’re fading
흐려지는 창밖엔
빛들이 춤을 춰
잠들기 싫은 밤이야

Tonight is ours to take
And the stars begin to wake

Drive me to the stars
Lead me through the night
우리 둘만 남은 밤
Drive me to the stars

Fly me through your hearts
너의 품 안에서
번져가
Softly

Tonight is ours to take
And the stars begin to wake

Drive me to the stars
Lead me through the night
우리 둘만 남은 밤
Drive me to the stars

Fly me through your hearts
너의 품 안에서
번져가
Softly

isi.driveFileNames: Witty - 별들은 말했어 (The Stars Told Me).mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Witty - 별들은 말했어 (The Stars Told Me)

Romanization

byeoldeureun malhaesseo
There’s the only way
swipge saenggakharae
mam biugo useoborae

byeoldeureun malhaesseo
There’s the only way
kkeutnatdeon gwageoneun
mite dugo
naraborae
byeoldeureun malhaesseo

jogeumui huimangdo ijen
nae dwiro sumeobeoryeonna
maeil bam hollo anja
sullo nal dallaegon haesseo
eolmana mugeowosseulkka
eolmana oerowosseulkka
ijen geuman geu nareseo
beoseo naogosipeo

So tell me,
what is the answer
deo isang hemegin sireo
jigeumkkeot himdeureotjana
ijen jom swigo sipdago
bamhaneul bomyeo bireobolge
geuneun deutgetji all of my prayer
ijen jom matgilge
My whole life

byeoldeureun malhaesseo
There’s the only way
swipge saenggakharae
mam biugo useoborae

byeoldeureun malhaesseo

byeoldeureun malhaesseo

mam biugo useoborae

byeoldeureun malhaesseo

kkeutnatdeon gwageoneun
mite dugo
naraborae
byeoldeureun malhaesseo

Hangeul

별들은 말했어
There’s the only way
쉽게 생각하래
맘 비우고 웃어보래

별들은 말했어
There’s the only way
끝났던 과거는
밑에 두고
날아보래
별들은 말했어

조금의 희망도 이젠
내 뒤로 숨어버렸나
매일 밤 홀로 앉아
술로 날 달래곤 했어
얼마나 무거웠을까
얼마나 외로웠을까
이젠 그만 그 날에서
벗어 나오고싶어

So tell me,
what is the answer
더 이상 헤메긴 싫어
지금껏 힘들었잖아
이젠 좀 쉬고 싶다고
밤하늘 보며 빌어볼게
그는 듣겠지 all of my prayer
이젠 좀 맡길게
My whole life

isi.lyrics:
Lyric inaekkum - 싱글컵(Single Cup)

Romanization

Single Cup 
woke up a little too late this morning, my bad 
But I won't blame myself cuz you know, my day
Well, sometimes I feel like the pills are making me high. 
But I won’t think too much cuz mom gave me pie
Finding joy in dumb things
just to breathe
Just to breathe

I don't know where I'll be tomorrow, can you tell?
But happy there's still more ahead, aren't you, Bell?
Well, sometimes I feel like time's just slippin away
But I won’t think too much cuz you gave me days

I love my life
I love to hear

All that noise drippin'
Such a beautiful waveform
Don't look back in regret
Cuz time is running out













Hangeul

Single Cup 
woke up a little too late this morning, my bad 
But I won't blame myself cuz you know, my day
Well, sometimes I feel like the pills are making me high. 
But I won’t think too much cuz mom gave me pie
Finding joy in dumb things
just to breathe
Just to breathe

I don't know where I'll be tomorrow, can you tell?
But happy there's still more ahead, aren't you, Bell?
Well, sometimes I feel like time's just slippin away
But I won’t think too much cuz you gave me days

I love my life
I love to hear

All that noise drippin'
Such a beautiful waveform
Don't look back in regret
Cuz time is running out

isi.lyrics:
Lyric PALE MAZE - 12월 (December)

Romanization

naega naega anin geot gateun
sigani gyesokdwae eodikkaji heureuljul moreugo
eonjejjeume i sijeori kkeutnal su isseulkka
geokjeongman deohaejyeo ganeun neon tto eolmana beogeomni

olhaega kkeutnagi jogeumjeon urineun meonjeo kkeutnaebeorija
nummulman gadeukhan neomu apeun hanhaereul
saehaega sijakdoegi jogeumjeon urin geunyang sijakhaebeorija
kkaekkeusi jiugo nummureomneun naldeureul hamkke haja

Hangeul

내가 내가 아닌 것 같은
시간이 계속돼 어디까지 흐를줄 모르고
언제쯤에 이 시절이 끝날 수 있을까
걱정만 더해져 가는 넌 또 얼마나 버겁니

올해가 끝나기 조금전 우리는 먼저 끝내버리자
눈물만 가득한 너무 아픈 한해를
새해가 시작되기 조금전 우린 그냥 시작해버리자
깨끗이 지우고 눈물없는 날들을 함께 하자
